titlestmt.author: compiled by Carol King, Nancy Lyon, and staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 09:18

descriptivenote.p: The materials are in English and French.

did.abstract: The collection consists of printed material relating to cultural, political, economic, and social conditions in Mali.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred from the African Collection Curator.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Mali Collection (MS 1529). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: African Collection, MS 605; Pamphlet Collection, MS 1351; African Postcard Collection, MS 1575. Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The material in the original accession is arranged chronologically, with photographs last. Additions to the collection may vary in arrangement.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of printed material relating to cultural, political, economic, and social conditions in Mali.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Government journals; newsletters; printed material; speeches
Political organizations: journals; newsletters; printed material
"Kalimu, Bulletin de Liaison": Union des Ecrivains Maliens
Union Démocratique du Peuple Malien (UDPM): printed material
Ambassade de France Service de Presse et d'Information
"U.N. Security Council Votes to Recommend the Admission of the Mali Federation to the United Nations" [address by Ambassador Armand Berard, Permanent Representative of France to the United Nations]

title.part: Jekabaara Jamana: Cikela ceman n'a musoman kunnafoniseben

did.unittitle: Le Petit Journal: Supplément Illustré , no. 772
Sadogo, Klena. "Oral Tradition and Archaeology," Institut des Sciences Humaines, Bamako
"Seydou Keita, Photographer: Portraits from Bamako, Mali"[program for exhibit at the National Museum of African Art, Smithsonian Institution, 1996 Mar 27-Jul 28]
Le Manuel du Citoyen , Dr. Abdoulaye Sall
Djé , no. 1, Front Démocratique des Patriotes Maliens (F.D.P.M.)
Shinintle , bulletin no. 2, Comité de Défense des Libertés Démocratiques au Mali
"Situation de l'Education des Filles dans les Pays du Sahel Causes et Perspectives," Adama Samassekou, Ministre de l'Education
"Règlement Intérieur," Association pour la Promotion Economique de la Femme (A.P.E.F.)

title.part: Center Djoliba: 40 ans au service du développement de Tout L'Homme et de Tous les hommes et femmes

did.unittitle: Institut du Sahel (INSAH), Indicateurs démographiques et socio-économiques du Mali, chart
Frères d' Armes: Revue trimestrielle des Forces Armées et de Sécurité , no. 2
Timbuktu: The Untold Story , movie poster
Mali/CPS/Ministère de la Santé, demographic chart
